Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jainub Hussain's motion to compel production of documents is moot as supplemental responses and documents have been provided to plaintiff after the filing of the motion. If the parties are unable to agree as to the proper scope of request #14 as amended, the Court would be inclined to order production of responsive documents from January 1, 2005 through January 31, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
